free_text: Absolute thick-target gamma-ray yields for the light
elements induced by 12-C, 14-N and 16-O ions
Accelerator laboratory
For the pure-element targets, the
error limits are expected to be below 20%, which
includes the errors in charge integration, peak area
determination and absolute efficiency of the detector.
In the compound target case, the main error source is
due to the stopping power correction.  The errors in
these cases may be as high as 40%.
Subentc 039 and 040 were corrected.
Correction in Subents 002-040 was made,
according compiler decision.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
Li-F pellet, 6 mm in diameter and 1 mm thick.
